name: Abbie Mitchell
abstract: Abriea "Abbie" Mitchell Cook (née Mitchell; 25 September 1884 – 16 March 1960), also billed as Abbey Mitchell, was an American soprano opera singer. She performed the role of Clara in the premiere production of George Gershwin's Porgy and Bess in 1935, and was also the first to record "Summertime" from that musical.

concerts.label: Benefit: Circle for Negro War Relief

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Whaley
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWEE] Abbie Mitchell. She sang that -- 'Won't you come with me in my great teepee and let me fold you in my' -- something like that.

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Wooding
about_quotes.evidence: We had such stars in that show like Freddie Washington and Abbie Mitchell.

about_quotes.speaker: Arthur Briggs
about_quotes.evidence: Mr. Mitchell formed our group and called us the Colored Dixieland Band.
